title: Party Secretary of Anhui

Name (English) | Name (Chinese) | Term start | Term end | Ref.

**Anhui Provincial Committee of the Chinese Communist Party** is the [leader](/wiki/Party_leader "Party leader") of the [Anhui Provincial Committee](/wiki/Anhui_Provincial_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party "Anhui Provincial Committee of the Chinese Communist Party") of the [Chinese Communist Party](/wiki/Chinese_Communist_Party "Chinese Communist Party") (CCP). As the CCP is the [sole ruling party](/wiki/One-party_state "One-party state") of the [People's Republic of China](/wiki/China "China") (PRC), the secretary is the highest ranking post in [Anhui](/wiki/Anhui "Anhui").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Provincial government position in China

| Secretary of the Anhui Provincial Committee of the Chinese Communist Party | |
| --- | --- |
| 中国共产党安徽省委员会书记 | |
| [Emblem of the Chinese Communist Party](/wiki/Emblem_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party "Emblem of the Chinese Communist Party") | |
| [Flag of the Chinese Communist Party](/wiki/Emblem_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party "Emblem of the Chinese Communist Party") | |
| Incumbent [Liang Yanshun](/wiki/Liang_Yanshun "Liang Yanshun") since 28 June 2024 | |
| [Anhui Provincial Committee of the Chinese Communist Party](/wiki/Anhui_Provincial_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party "Anhui Provincial Committee of the Chinese Communist Party") | |
| Type | [Party Committee Secretary](/wiki/Chinese_Communist_Party_Committee_Secretary "Chinese Communist Party Committee Secretary") |
| Status | [Provincial and ministerial-level official](/wiki/Civil_service_of_the_People%27s_Republic_of_China#Levels_and_ranking_system "Civil service of the People's Republic of China") |
| Member of | [Anhui Provincial Standing Committee](/wiki/Chinese_Communist_Party_Provincial_Standing_Committee "Chinese Communist Party Provincial Standing Committee") |
| Nominator | [Central Committee](/wiki/Central_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party "Central Committee of the Chinese Communist Party") |
| Appointer | Anhui Provincial Committee [Central Committee](/wiki/Central_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party "Central Committee of the Chinese Communist Party") |
| Inaugural holder | [Zeng Xisheng](/wiki/Zeng_Xisheng "Zeng Xisheng") |
| Formation | January 1952 |
| Deputy | Deputy Secretary Secretary-General |

The **secretary of the** **Anhui Provincial Committee of the Chinese Communist Party** is the [leader](/wiki/Party_leader "Party leader") of the [Anhui Provincial Committee](/wiki/Anhui_Provincial_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party "Anhui Provincial Committee of the Chinese Communist Party") of the [Chinese Communist Party](/wiki/Chinese_Communist_Party "Chinese Communist Party") (CCP). As the CCP is the [sole ruling party](/wiki/One-party_state "One-party state") of the [People's Republic of China](/wiki/China "China") (PRC), the secretary is the highest ranking post in [Anhui](/wiki/Anhui "Anhui").

The secretary is officially appointed by the [CCP Central Committee](/wiki/Central_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party "Central Committee of the Chinese Communist Party") based on the recommendation of the [CCP Organization Department](/wiki/Organization_Department_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party "Organization Department of the Chinese Communist Party"), which is then approved by the [Politburo](/wiki/Politburo_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party "Politburo of the Chinese Communist Party") and its [Standing Committee](/wiki/Politburo_Standing_Committee_of_the_Chinese_Communist_Party "Politburo Standing Committee of the Chinese Communist Party"). The secretary can be also appointed by a plenary meeting of the Anhui Provincial Committee, but the candidate must be the same as the one approved by the central government. The secretary leads the Standing Committee of the Anhui Provincial Committee, and is usually a member of the CCP Central Committee. The secretary leads the work of the Provincial Committee and its Standing Committee. The secretary is outranks the [governor](/wiki/Governor_of_Anhui "Governor of Anhui"), who is generally the [deputy secretary](/wiki/Chinese_Communist_Party_Deputy_Committee_Secretary "Chinese Communist Party Deputy Committee Secretary") of the committee.

The current secretary is [Liang Yanshun](/wiki/Liang_Yanshun "Liang Yanshun"), who took office on 28 June 2024.
